mapper.sql: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.avatar AS authorAvatar FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{id}, #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
